name: Primite Dragon Nether Berzelius
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>原</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>げん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>石</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>せき</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>竜</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>りゅう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>ネザー・ベルセリウス
desc:
1 "Primite" monster + 1+ Normal Monsters
Gains 1000 ATK for each Normal Monster used for its Fusion Summon. Negate the activated effects of monsters your opponent controls, whose Levels/Ranks/Link Ratings are less than or equal to the number of Normal Monsters in your field and GY. If this card is sent from the field to the GY: You can Special Summon 1 Normal Monster from your Deck in Defense Position.
mnst_eff:

Gains 1000 ATK for each Normal Monster used for its Fusion Summon. eff:

If this card is sent from the field to the GY: You can Special Summon 1 Normal Monster from your Deck in Defense Position.

action: Activates if sent to the Graveyard
mst: Negates the effects of your opponent's Effect Monsters
summoning: Requires nonspecific Normal Monsters as Fusion Materials
